protocol.strict_mdd: includes in-position adverse excursion and period-contained forced exits
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTCUSDT/BTC only unless explicitly changed by user
protocol.feature_inputs: External explanatory variables are allowed if merged causally: DXY, kimchi, USDKRW, Upbit BTC, BTC derivatives, and optionally other-coin lead/lag. They do not imply changing the traded asset.
protocol.alpha_pool_threshold: Feature/gate discoveries are promoted into alpha_pool only when a combined strategy clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=2.5; live-grade standalone requires >=3.0.

feature_tiers.alpha_feature: Strictly promoted feature family: directly tied to strategy-level edge. Requires a combined strategy using this feature to clear test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5, or a standalone/live-grade strategy using it to clear >=3.0, with nontrivial trades and reproducible recipe.
feature_tiers.beta_feature: Potential alpha-feature pool: plausible edge remains, but current evidence has not met alpha-feature promotion threshold. Use for selector/gate/exit experiments with strict contamination notes.
feature_tiers.gamma_feature: Strict noise/failure pool: only for feature families where evidence strongly shows the attempted usage is noise/invalid/repeatedly non-causal. Gamma means avoid similar retries unless the recorded disqualifying evidence is overturned.

beta_to_alpha_feature: A reproducible strategy using the feature clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5 after 6bp/side, strict in-position MDD, split-end forced close.
Trade support is not trivial: normally test2024 >=20 trades and eval2025 >=15 trades, unless explicitly marked sparse low-frequency and manually accepted.
Eval2025 is not clearly broken: positive CAGR and no obvious MDD explosion; live-grade standalone requires CAGR/strict_MDD >=3.0.
Feature contribution is identifiable versus baseline/no-feature variant or portfolio marginal contribution.
generation_recipe and usage evidence are complete.
beta_to_gamma_feature: Requires strong evidence that the attempted feature family/usage is only noise, not merely below current alpha/live thresholds.

Acceptable evidence: repeated broad + targeted scans show no robust positive test/eval structure and no useful selector contribution; or leakage/no-op/causal invalidation; or consistent regime inversion/OOS collapse across independent variants.
Gamma entry must name the exact failed usage mode. If a different usage mode remains plausible, keep that feature family in beta and put only the failed search set/provenance in gamma.
Do not gamma-demote broad inventories or search sets just because they are not alpha features; they should be provenance unless they encode a failed/noisy usage mode.
Do not gamma-demote because live-grade is missing; beta is for remaining alpha-feature possibility.
gamma_to_beta_feature: Only allowed if new data, corrected methodology, or a materially different usage mode removes the recorded failure reason.
Must show at least one reproducible combined strategy with test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=1.5 and positive eval2025, or strong portfolio-selector contribution before alpha threshold.

entries.name: BTC OHLCV + taker core
entries.description: BTC 5m OHLCV, quote volume, taker buy quote/base, VWAP gap, range, realized vol, taker imbalance/CVD.
known_failures: single composite Alpha101/VPIN scores are too weak
entries.evidence: BTC-only VWAP/funding/Asia candidate has strong 2024 and positive 2026 but weak 2025 ratio; keep as research candidate, not live.
entries.leakage_notes: Causal bars only; thresholds train quantiles. Verify any day/session feature does not use current-day future close.
entries.next_action: Explore BTC-only variants around VWAP dislocation + taker non-confirmation + funding/premium regime; require 2025 ratio improvement before promotion.

generation_recipe.command:
python - <<'PY'
from training.search_vpin_formulaic_alpha import load_market_and_splits
m,_,masks,years=load_market_and_splits(); print(m.columns.tolist()); print({k:int(v.sum()) for k,v in masks.items()})
PY

protocol.mdd: strict MDD includes in-position adverse excursion; period exits must remain inside split

notes: Derived features are implemented in individual search scripts: search_btc_only_quantile_standalone.add_features, search_alpha101_derivative_alphas.add_features.

entries.tier_rationale: Core dependency of promoted/candidate strategy sleeves with strategy-level edge evidence; retain but re-audit if exact sleeve evidence changes.

entries.name: BTC open interest features
entries.description: BTCUSDT open interest returns and OI-vs-price z-score divergences.
known_failures: raw OI/taker standalone scans often fail train or eval
high frequency OI rules can become 2025-only artifacts
entries.evidence: OI high/low sleeves are useful in portfolio; standalone OI/taker scans mostly weak or unstable.
entries.leakage_notes: OI file begins 2020-09; quantiles must ignore unavailable/zero-filled periods for OI-specific thresholds.
entries.next_action: Keep OI as sleeve/selector feature; promote standalone only if train/test/eval all positive with adequate trade count.

generation_recipe.command:
python - <<'PY'
from training.search_vpin_formulaic_alpha import load_market_and_splits
from training.search_btc_only_quantile_standalone import add_features
m,_,_,_=load_market_and_splits(); f=add_features(m); print([c for c in f.columns if 'oi' in c][:30])
PY

notes: OI thresholds must ignore unavailable periods via oi_available.

entries.tier_rationale: Core dependency of promoted/candidate strategy sleeves with strategy-level edge evidence; retain but re-audit if exact sleeve evidence changes.

entries.name: BTC funding/premium/basis
entries.description: BTCUSDT funding rate and premium-index/basis z-scores.
known_failures: funding/premium alone has sparse/zero-trade failures in older scans
entries.evidence: pb30_funding + activity_flow_htf remains a kept bullish-regime baseline; BTC-only funding gate helps VWAP reversion candidate but not enough for live.
entries.leakage_notes: Funding/premium must be asof/backward merged; never use future funding print.
entries.next_action: Use as context/gate rather than standalone; preserve pb30_funding baseline.

entries.name: pb30 + activity_flow_htf feature family
entries.description: Bullish regime pullback/funding entry with high-timeframe activity flow score.
known_failures: not well suited to high-frequency trading
additional selector/gates often reduce trades too much
entries.evidence: Kept/promoted as live-capable baseline in prior workflow; target 5 ratio only via leverage-scaled variant, but leverage scaling is not alpha.
entries.leakage_notes: User explicitly warned not to overinterpret CAGR; inactive periods count.
entries.next_action: Keep but do not use as template for medium-frequency alpha; separate alpha search from leverage scaling.
